steps: Go to https://vendors.paddle.com/authentication (log in with your Paddle account first)
Click 'Generate API key' (or 'New API key' for enhanced keys)
Give your key a descriptive name
Copy the generated API key immediately — it will not be shown again
For sandbox testing, repeat in the Paddle Sandbox at https://sandbox-vendors.paddle.com/authentication

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Paddle API key (starts with pdl_live_ for production or pdl_sdbx_ for sandbox)

notes: Sandbox keys start with pdl_sdbx_ and live keys start with pdl_live_
API key is shown only once at creation — store it securely
Keys created before May 6, 2025 are legacy keys; migrate to new format if needed
Use sandbox base URL https://sandbox-api.paddle.com for testing
Paddle acts as merchant of record — pricing and tax rules apply from setup
Use Authorization: Bearer <api_key> in request headers

test_endpoint.description: List all products in your Paddle catalog
